_meta.description: Multi-turn conversation planning + session summarization — extracted from e2e-scenarios.test.ts

constants.available_tools: exec, read_file, write_file, web_fetch, browser, memory_read, memory_write, memory_search, send_message, cron, canvas_create, canvas_update, canvas_data, canvas_delete, canvas_action_wait, canvas_components, canvas_api_schema, canvas_api_seed, canvas_api_query, personality_update

examples.source_test: agent reads config, checks status, and writes a report
examples.user_message: Check the deploy log and write a summary report

examples.source_test: agent reads a file, transforms it, and writes the result
examples.user_message: Convert data.csv to JSON format and save it

examples.source_test: agent send_message tool delivers cross-channel notifications
examples.user_message: Notify the Discord channel that v2.4.0 has been deployed

examples.source_test: full lifecycle: create surface → apply schema → seed → query
examples.user_message: Build me a task tracker where I can add, complete, and delete tasks

examples.source_test: agent creates a flight search UI and waits for user selection
examples.user_message: Find flights from SFO to JFK and let me pick one

examples.source_test: agent creates a surface, adds components, and populates data via tool calls
examples.user_message: What's the weather like today? Show it visually

examples.conversation_history_summary: User: My name is Alice. Agent: Nice to meet you, Alice!

examples.user_message: Send a message to both Slack and Discord about the new release
Research the latest AI model benchmarks and save a summary

examples.messages_text:
user: My name is Alice, I'm in PST timezone.
assistant: Nice to meet you, Alice! I'll keep your timezone in mind.
user: Can you check my GitHub for new PRs?
assistant: [tool: web_fetch] Found 3 open PRs needing review.
user: Great, summarize them.
assistant: 1. Fix auth bug (#142) - 2 approvals. 2. Add dark mode (#143) - needs review. 3. Refactor DB (#144) - 1 comment.

system: Heartbeat check.
assistant: [tool: exec] All systems nominal. CPU: 23%, Memory: 4.2GB/16GB.
system: Heartbeat check.
assistant: [tool: exec] All systems nominal. CPU: 21%, Memory: 4.1GB/16GB.
system: Heartbeat check.
assistant: [tool: exec] All systems nominal. CPU: 25%, Memory: 4.3GB/16GB.
user: Hey, any issues today?
assistant: No issues detected. All 3 heartbeat checks passed with normal metrics.

user: Deploy the new version to staging.
assistant: [tool: exec] Running deployment to staging... Done. v2.4.0 deployed.
user: Run the smoke tests.
assistant: [tool: exec] All 12 smoke tests passed.
user: Great, deploy to production.
assistant: [tool: exec] Deploying to production... Done. v2.4.0 is live.
user: Notify the team on Slack.
assistant: [tool: send_message] Posted to #releases: v2.4.0 deployed to production.

examples.user_message: Now make my contact list a full CRUD app — add an API backend and seed with 3 contacts
examples.conversation_history_summary: User previously built a simple contact list canvas with name, email, phone

examples.user_message: Build me a KPI dashboard canvas using the metrics I told you about
examples.conversation_history_summary: User previously said: 'Remember our team tracks these KPIs: MRR, churn rate, NPS score, and active users.'

examples.user_message: Log this in memory as an active incident, then show me an incident status canvas with severity badge
examples.conversation_history_summary: User reported: 'Critical ticket — Production database is down, from customer Acme Corp'

examples.user_message: Add an Alert component at the top warning that we're at 85% of budget, yellow/warning severity
examples.conversation_history_summary: User previously built an expense dashboard with metrics and a category Chart

examples.user_message: What are the benefits of using TypeScript?
examples.conversation_history_summary: User previously asked agent to update personality to always respond in exactly 3 bullet points
